name: MIT Sloan Management Review

length.inclusions: includes references, tables, figures; excludes a research-methodology section
length.note: Shorter articles 800-1,800 words. Proposal-first workflow encouraged (<=1,500 word proposal).

abstract.note: No abstract; a proposal of up to 1,500 words is encouraged before a full draft.

citation_style: Superscript numbered endnotes. Chicago for the notes; AP Stylebook for everything else, with house exceptions.

formatting.note: Manuscript formatting not specified; house-edited heavily.

contents: Disclose financial relationships with any companies cited.
Confirm not published or submitted elsewhere.
cover_letter.note: No formal cover letter; online submission form.

ai_disclosure.note: Must disclose which AI tool was used and how (writing, images/graphics, data collection/analysis). Authors fully responsible. Adapted from COPE.

distinctive_rules: Endnote house style: do not spell out authors' first names; book titles in quotation marks, not italics; magazine names plain.
